name: Satay Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon palm sugar or brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the thick coconut milk:
1. Use 2 cups of desiccated unsweetened coconut from health food shops or Oriental stores.
2. Scald 3 cups of whole milk in a saucepan until hot.
3. Add the coconut to the heated milk and stir gently.
4. Remove from heat and let stand for some time, stirring occasionally.
5. Strain through a sieve using the back of a spoon to extract as much liquid as possible. Let cool to room temperature before using.
